metadata.title: Traps
metadata.description: Welcome to the Traps Documentation site! Select a guide below to learn about Traps features and how to deploy them. With Traps, you can choose between the Traps management service, a cloud-delivered service, or the Traps Endpoint Security Manager, an on-premise security solution.
metadata.keywords: Traps, Endpoint Security Manager, Traps Management Service, Cortex, 3.4, 5.0
